metadata.source: Five Parsecs From Home Core Rules 3e pp.60-62 — VERIFIED Apr 2, 2026
metadata.notes: 14 ship components from Core Rules. v2.0: Replaced fabricated generic components with exact Core Rules data. Costs in credits. Only 1 component can be installed per campaign turn. Components are functional at the start of the next turn.

components.name: Medical Bay
components.description: Fully stocked medical facility to aid long-term recovery. Each campaign turn when recovering from Injuries, select a crew member who can mark off 2 campaign turns of recovery time.

components.name: Cargo Hold
components.description: Upgraded environmentally stable hold. When traveling to a new planet, roll 2D6 and discard any 5-6. Select the highest remaining die and earn that many credits. If both dice discarded, no shipments available. Lost if ship damaged in transit.

components.name: Data Base
components.description: Extensive data records for decision making. When traveling to a new planet, roll up details for one additional planet, then select which to visit.

components.name: Shuttle
components.description: Launch bay with a standard 'Lemon Shark' shuttle. Distress Call event: roll twice and pick higher. Invaded planet: add +2 to the roll to get off-world.

components.name: Merchant Link
components.description: Corporate extra-net access point. You may carry out one free Trade action each campaign turn without requiring a crew member to be assigned to it.

components.name: Drop Launcher
components.description: Rapid deployment system. Battle setup: roll 2D6, on 8+ select up to two crew for drop deployment. At end of any round, place marker, move 1D6" random direction, set up both within 1". Cannot act on arrival, act normally next round.

components.name: Probe Launcher
components.description: Scientific probe launching device. If you receive the Asteroids Starship Travel event, you can roll twice to avoid the field.

components.name: Auto-Turrets
components.description: Auto-tracking Hyper-Laser turret. Raided event: add +1 to avoid battle. Invasion flee: add +1 to the roll.

components.name: Military Nav System
components.description: Improved navigation system. Navigation Trouble event: do not subtract 1 story point. Travel-Time event: receive benefits of both Travel-Time AND Uneventful Trip.

components.name: Improved Shielding
components.description: Armor plating and directional screen generators. If ship would sustain damage from any source, reduce damage by 1 Hull Point. Asteroids event: applies to each hit separately.

components.name: Hidden Compartment
components.description: Concealed storage space. Patrol Ship event: only roll once for confiscated items. Each time you travel, roll 3D6 — discard dice that don't score 1 or 2, earn credits equal to sum of remaining.

components.name: Suspension Pod
components.description: Standard for non-jump travel. Suspend up to 4 crew: no upkeep, no events, no missions, no injury recovery. Revive during any future Upkeep step.

components.name: Living Quarters
components.description: Improved living quarters and life support. When determining Upkeep, count your crew as having two members less than normal.

components.name: Military Fuel Converters
components.description: Devices allowing conversion of readily available matter into Jump fuel. Starship travel costs reduced by 2 credits.
